Common.title: PREIO - Personalized Real Estate Advisory
Common.description: Personalized real estate advisory system for high-net-worth clients.

Assessment.title: Private Strategic Advisory
Assessment.subtitle: Secure your legacy through elite real estate advisory.
Assessment.intro: Personalized advisory strategies for high-value property owners.
Assessment.p1_desc: Access off-market data and institutional-grade analytics usually reserved for global property funds.
Assessment.p2_desc: Structure your real estate portfolio for long-term value preservation against market volatility.
Assessment.p3_desc: Precise execution of high-value transactions with complete discretion and professional oversight.

LeadForm.success_msg: Our senior advisor will contact you within 24 hours.

hero.title: Personalized Real Estate Advisory
hero.subtitle: Exclusive advisory for high-net-worth real estate portfolios. Proactive. Private. Precise.

step1.title: Strategic Assessment
step1.desc: Initial alignment of property objectives and value preservation goals.

step2.title: Institutional Review
step2.desc: Direct vetting by our senior advisory board to ensure mutual strategic fit.

step3.title: Private Briefing
step3.desc: Confidential disclosure of institutional-grade opportunities and risk audits.

step4.title: Activation
step4.desc: Full activation of the Elite Advisory Engine and property portfolio oversight.

engine1.title: Elite Lead Engine
engine1.desc: Identifying institutional-grade opportunities through proprietary market logic.

engine2.title: Client Advisory System
engine2.desc: Deep profiling of investor mandates and strategic requirements.

engine3.title: Project Advisory Engine
engine3.desc: Multidimensional analysis of legal, risk, and infrastructure metrics.

engine4.title: Advisory Fit Engine
engine4.desc: Real-time algorithmic matching of projects to client profiles.

engine5.title: Executive Client Portal
engine5.desc: Secure transparency for acquisition progress and project oversight.

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.text: The PREIO framework eliminates retail speculation. Every property is audited across six institutional dimensions—Legal, Connectivity, Infrastructure, Market Liquidity, Appreciation Potential, and Risk—to generate a definitive Advisory Grade.

authority.title: Strategic Authority
authority.text: PREIO operates as a Strategic Advisory Office, not a brokerage. We do not sell properties directly; we aggregate advisory insights to ensure project suitability and maximize the strategic legacy of our partners.

footer.copyright: © 2026 PREIO - Private Real Estate Advisory Office. All rights reserved.

Workspace.title: Client Decisions
Workspace.subtitle: Includes projects currently in the deep advisory pipeline.
Workspace.empty_desc: Select projects from the Opportunity Board to begin your institutional evaluation.

AdvisoryBrief.conclusion_intro: Based on the current institutional matching algorithm, this project represents a {label} alignment with your property advisory profile.
AdvisoryBrief.risk_conclusion: The project's risk rating of {score}/100 falls within your defined risk ceiling.
AdvisoryBrief.location_conclusion: Strategic location alignment of {score}% ensures long-term portfolio synergy.
AdvisoryBrief.generated_by: Generated by PREIO Advisory Engine v3.0
AdvisoryBrief.not_available: No analyst notes available for this project. Please contact your dedicated advisor for a deeper qualitative review.

DashboardOverview.advisory_precision_desc: Your property evaluation metrics are computed by the Advisory Engine in real-time. Ensure your strategic profile is up to date.
DashboardOverview.account_required_desc: Please consult with an advisor or complete the assessment to enable your strategic dashboard.
